info.name: VedicAstroAPI v3.4 (21 Languages - Vedic, Western and Tarot)
info.description:
### New Launch!

# 🟢 Western and Tarot APIs 🟢

Providing you the most simplest **multi-lingual APIs** for astrology websites. This API can be used in any platform of choice, From web, to mobile to voice apps

# Authentication

Use the **API key** given by signing up on VedicAstroAPI

# Error Codes

All responses with status as **200 are all valid.**  
(Except chart images, where it's a direct SVG string without)

# Rate limit

The **APIs scales with higher plans**, The more you use the faster and more efficient it will become. The base plans start with 20 request per second and goes upto 500 requests per second in the highest plans

query.description: Time of Birth in Hours - HH:MM
TimeZone in jumps of 0.5 - (ex: 5:30 will be 5.5, 5:45 will be 5.75)

This API supports the following languages: 
be (Bengali), fr (French), hi (Hindi), 
ka (Kannada), ml (Malayalam), sp (Spanish), 
ta (Tamil), te (Telugu), mr (Marathi), si (Sinhalese), 
ne (Nepali), ko (Korean), ja (Japanese), gu (Gujarati), 
pt (Portuguese), de (German), tr (Turkish), 
ru (Russian), it (Italian), nl (Dutch), and pl (Polish).

response.body:
{
    "status": 200,
    "response": {
        "is_dosha_present": true,
        "dosha_direction": "Descending",
        "dosha_type": "Shankpal",
        "rahu_ketu_axis": "4-10",
        "bot_response": "This person has Shankhpal Kaal Sarp Dosh. If the Rahu is in the 4th house and Ketu is in the 10th house, having all other planets between them, then the yoga is known as Shankhpal Kaal Sarp Dosh. A person under the influence of this Yoga sees financial hardships, diseases, and a lot of problems in their houses. There is really minimal happiness and a person faces many problems in education.",
        "remedies": [
            "Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. A person having Kaal Sarpa Yoga in his/her kundli should worship Lord Shiva regularly and for better results, one can also chant the Moola Mantra of Lord Shiva. “Om Namah Shivaya”(ॐ नमः शिवाय). This mantra acts as a Kaal Sarpa Dosha Nivaran mantra. The students who are affected by the malefic effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga should chant the Moola Mantra of Goddess Sarasvati. Chanting the Moola mantra will enhance the concentration power of the students and as a result, they will be able to perform better. ‘Om SaraswatiMayaa Drishtwa, VeenaPustak Dharnim| HansVahini Samayuktaa MaaVidya DaanKarotu Me Om’",
            "Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. In an auspicious Muhurat, offer three pieces of coal in flowing water, one at a time. It is one of the best Kaal Sarpa Dosh remedies. This will nullify the effect of Kaal Sarpa Dosh from the native’s horoscope and he/she would be able to lead a more peaceful and happy life.Chanting Hanuman Chalisa 108 times regularly is highly beneficial for the natives who are suffering from Kaal Sarpa Yoga. The people who are affected by this yoga can also visit Lord Hanuman’s Mandir and can apply a Tilak of Sindhoor from the idol of Lord Hanuman.",
            "Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Chanting Maha Mrityunjaya Mantra 108 times on a Rudraksha Rosary will help the native in getting rid of the Kaal Sarpa Yoga.'Om Tayambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pustivardhanam. Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrtyor Muksiya Mamratat’.",
            "Keeping a peacock’s feather in the home will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. Children can also keep it in their books for enhancing their concentration level.",
            "On every Saturday, worshipping Lord Shani and chanting the Moola Mantra of Lord Shani will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. People can also offer sesame and black gram to Lord Shani.‘Om Shani Charaya Namaha’",
            "Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Place the Kaal Sarpa Yoga Yantra in your home in an auspicious Mahurat to get rid of the Kaal sarpa Yoga. You can also chant this Moola mantra for energizing the yantra. “Bramha Muri Tripurantkari Bhanuh Shashih BhumiSuto Budhashch”",
            "Do pooja on Naag Panchami and after the pooja, make sure that the snake charmer frees the snake in an open ground. ",
            "General Shiva Pooja. Even a general Shiva Pooja where one would chant a certain Stotra of Lord Shiva will also reduce the impact of Kaal Sarpaa Dosha. This will please Lord Shiva who can remove all the problems from a natives life. This canting of the mantras in the pooja should be done religiously and with an outbreak.",
            "Do Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja. On every Monday, on the same place and time, offer a handful of wheat, shrivel and a coin of 1, 2, 5, or 10. Chant the name of Lord Rama while offering all these things. Make sure that you take the same value of the coin on every Monday. Perform this cycle of activities for 21 Mondays and get rid of this Yoga."
        ]
    },
        "remaining_api_calls": 393498
}

response.body:
{
    "status": 200,
    "response": {
        "is_dosha_present": true,
        "bot_response": "Pitra dosha happens when Saturn / Rahu is conjunct or aspects sun or moon.  This occurs in your horoscope and thus this dosha is present in your birth chart.",
        "effects": [
            "Children can face mental and physical disabilities. Either later or from the day of the birth.",
            "Un-favorable environment and arguments on small things with life-partner.",
            "Sometimes one is not able to marry at the correct time. Delay in marriage.",
            "The person face financial and physical problems due to continuous sickness.",
            "The person is having Pitra Dosh, if he is not able to achieve success in any work he starts.",
            "Continuous scarcity and financial problems.",
            "If the person or any other family member see dreams related to snakes hint towards this dosha.",
            "One can have a dream of ancestors asking you for food or clothes."
        ],
        "remedies": [
            "Offer water to Banyan tree regularly.",
            "Keep fasts to reduce the effects of Dosha.",
            "Organize Pooja or Mantra Jap to nullify the effects of past sinful activities done by ancestors.",
            "Give food to Brahmins on every Amavasya.",
            "Donate food, blankets, bedding and clothes on the day of Ardh-Kumbha-Snaan.",
            "Give food and milk to cows, street dogs, crows and ants.",
            "Complete Trapandi Shraad.",
            "Give help to poor, needy and old people as much as possible.",
            "Chant the mantras of Devi Kaalika Stotram. Especially on Navratri.",
            "Do Snaan at various religious places like, Ujjain, Nasik, Ganga Sagar, Haridwar, etc.",
            "Offer water mixed with sesame seeds to the rising Sun regularly and chant Gayatri Mantra."
        ]
    },
     "remaining_api_calls": 393496
}

          "description": "Sadhe Sati refers to the seven-and-a-half year period in which Saturn moves through three signs, the moon sign, one before the moon and the one after it. Sadhe Sati starts when Saturn (Shani) enters the 12th sign from the birth Moon sign and ends when Saturn leaves 2nd sign from the birth Moon sign. Since Saturn approximately takes around two and half years to transit a sign which is called Shanis dhaiya it takes around seven and half year to transit three signs and that is why it is known as Sadhe Sati. Generally Sade-Sati comes thrice in a horoscope in the life time - first in childhood, second in youth & third in old-age. First Sade-Sati has effect on education & parents. Second Sade-Sati has effect on profession, finance & family. The last one affects health more than anything else.",

If the nakshatra is not Pushya, then Punarvasu, Vishakha, or Purva Bhadrapad are also auspicious for buying a yellow sapphire. The gem should be given to the jeweler on the same day, between sun rise and 11.00 A.M. The best time to wear a yellow sapphire ring is in the early morning.",

response.name: Radical Number Details
response.body:
{
    "status": 200,
    "response": {
        "content": [
            "Your Radical Number, 1, resonates with the assertive energy of the Sun, imbuing you with determination and leadership qualities. Much like the Sun's commanding presence, you possess an innate drive to take charge and achieve your goals independently. Your self-reliance and confidence shine brightly, often inspiring others to follow your lead. You thrive on challenges and are undeterred by obstacles that come your way.",
            "Your path is characterised by a strong sense of individuality and a desire to make your mark on the world. You're a trailblazer, forging new paths and pushing boundaries. Your ambitious nature propels you to initiate multiple projects simultaneously, and while some may remain unfinished due to your relentless pursuit of innovation, your boldness is a testament to your unique spirit.",
            "In matters of love and relationships, your independence may sometimes create a balance between closeness and autonomy. As a result, you're fiercely loyal to your loved ones while maintaining your sense of self. Your social standing is marked by admiration, as you exude an aura of authority and inspire those around you. While your journey may present its share of ups and downs, your Radical Number 1 fuels your unwavering determination, guiding you to embrace your leadership qualities and carve a distinct path through life's challenges."
        ],
        "fasting": "The natives should keep fast and take their meal only once on Sunday and that too without salt. They should have bath in the morning and make a chanting of 'Aditya Hridaya Stotra' before having their meal. Doing this, they will feel that they are getting free from hurdles and diseases. This they should do for one year, on thirty or twelve Sundays. On this day, they should wear red apparels and pray the Sun by chanting Surya Gayatri Mantra. They should offer a copper pot full of sacred water to the Sun with Red Chandan, Roli, rice, red flowers and Durva. After all this, Jap of Surya Mantra should be repeated reverentially on a rosary of Surya Mani.",
        "fav_lord": "People of radical number 1 should worship the Sun and offer Him a pot of water early in the morning pouring there in Roli and rice and repeating Surya Gayatri Mantra for eleven or twenty one times. The Sun gives life to the mankind. Therefore, this religious exercise will save these people from diseases and problems. If it is not possible, then observe daily a gold ring etched with a ruby.",
        "fav_gayatri_mantra": [
            "To get the favorable effects of the Sun enhanced, the natives should repeat reverentially the Surya Gayatri Mantra eleven, twenty-one or one hundred and eight times.",
            "Om Aadityaaya Vidmahe prabhaakaraaya Dheemahi Tannah Suryah Prachodayaat."
        ],
        "graha_mantra": [
            "Every Sunday, They should chant Surya Mantra to make the Sun favorable. They can get desired result, if they chant the following Mantra for one hundred and eight times on a rosary. Sixty rosary Japs are essential to complete the Anushthaan.",
            "Om Hraang Hreeng Hraung Sah Suryay Namah.",
            " Number of Japs: 6000"
        ],
        "fav_mantra": [
            "After getting up in the morning, the natives should contemplate the Sun by chanting the following Mantra",
            "Japaa Kusum Sankashaam Kaashyapeyam Maha Dyutim.Tamoaring Sarvapaapaghanam Pranatoasmi Diwaakaram"
        ],
        "yantra": "To keep the Sun favorable, the Surya Yantra should be cast on a piece of Bhojapatra with Astagandh ink (Saffron, Camphor, Agar, Tagar, Musk, Ambar, Gorochan and Rakt or White Chandan) and then the natives should wear it in a gold or copper talisman in gold chain or red thread in the morning on a Sunday in Shuklapaksha. The talisman should be worshipped with Dhoop-Deep before being worn.",
        "personality": [
            "The Radical number of a native born on 1,10,19 or 28 is 1. People having 1 as Radical number are under the influence of the Sun. They happen to be steady and firm in their stands. They try to abide by their promise. They have a strong will power and they keep on trying to accomplish what all they undertake. Their love affairs and friendship continue to be sweet. Their dispute with their enemies continues for long.",
            "People of this type feel uneasy working under others since they are independent-minded. They like to work independently. They do not like others to interfere in the way they work. They possess some qualities of the Sun, as the Sun is the lord of number 1. Under the influence of the Sun, they prove to be altruists. They like to be renowned in the society like the rays of the Sun are spread all over the world. They always want to be the leader of organisations and to be appoined at high posts. They achieve all this by their labour."
        ]
    },
    "remaining_api_calls": 393501
}

This influence encourages you to listen to your body deeply, perhaps even initiating a wellness journey that enhances both physical and mental health.

The beginning of the quarter could inspire you to evaluate your health routines and establish a harmonious balance, especially in how you communicate your needs.  is a time when taking intuitive actions towards healing can lead to transformative experiences.

However, the presence of Rahu or North Node in the 12th house also brings a layer of illusion that could manifest as obsessive thoughts around health. It's crucial to be aware of potential anxiety; grounding practices such as meditation or yoga can help.

Ketu or South Node’s transit in Virgo in the 6th house underscores a strong connection to spirituality and a risk of neglecting physical health when focused on higher ideals. This might push you to detach from unhealthy habits but also reminds you to pay attention to everyday routines.

As the quarter advances to the second month, expect Mercury to emphasize the need for clearer communication about your health. This is an excellent time to seek professional advice or to be proactive in scheduling check-ups.

When the Sun enters Pisces in March, you'll feel a surge in vitality, reminding you to channel your energy productively. The month may also heighten your sense of responsibility towards maintaining wellness. However, with Saturn in the 12th house, discipline will be essential; avoid the temptation to overextend yourself.

Embrace this quarter as an opportunity for introspection and growth. Your innate courage paired with the reflective energies around you will guide you toward better health awareness and habits. Balancing the positives of transformation and patience against the negatives of impulsiveness and worry will be key."
            },
            "relationship": {
              "score": 75,
              "prediction": "In the first quarter, Aries individuals may experience a refreshing boost in their relationships, primarily driven by the influence of Jupiter in Taurus, nestled comfortably in your second house. This planetary position encourages stability and harmony, promoting feelings of balance in your love life. With a focus on romance, you are likely to find greater patience and creativity in your interactions, stirring up deeper connections with your partner.

As Jupiter blesses you with wisdom, this is an opportune time to explore new dimensions in your relationships, fostering an environment ripe for discussions about commitment and even marriage. Utilize  period to reflect on what truly matters in your partnerships, as your instinctual drive towards romance could ignite a deeper passion.

Moreover, the alignment of beneficial energies suggests that you may find joy in group activities or social gatherings, leading to new connections and enhancing the support within existing relationships. Seek to build stability; the forces of the universe are on your side during this quarter, encouraging you to take initiative and explore new avenues of connection and understanding.

While there are no clear adverse influences in this phase, be mindful of keeping your balance. Invest time in nurturing the relationships that matter most, and don't hesitate to express your affections openly. Embrace the luck that comes your way, and watch as your emotional landscape flourishes."
            },
            "career": {
              "score": 87,
              "prediction": "As you step into the first quarter, the alignment of Mercury and the Sun in Capricorn in your 10th house amplifies your career pursuits. Your discipline and ambition will be at an all-time high, and you might find yourself taking the lead on important projects. Communication skills will play a vital role; ensure that you articulate your thoughts clearly when discussing ideas with superiors or colleagues.

The presence of Ketu or South Node in your 6th house suggests a deeper awareness of work-life balance. You may seek to detach from overwhelming stress, which means focusing on efficient task management rather than getting bogged down in minor details. This can contribute positively to your overall health and enhance your public image, allowing you to shine at work.

Professionally, collaboration is urged at this time. Build strong relationships that could lead to mentorship or valuable partnerships. Your analytical skills will help you navigate complex situations with ease, so trust your instincts when dealing with new opportunities.

Stay aware that your efforts might be recognized publicly, leading to possible promotions or greater responsibility. However, remember to maintain humility amidst your brightening prospects. This is a powerful time for setting foundations that can lead to long-term success. Embrace the energy, trust your capabilities, and keep your focus on long-term growth rather than immediate gains."
            },
            "travel": {
              "score": 23,
              "prediction": "As the planets align, this quarter presents a mixed bag for your travel plans, Aries. The dominant influence of Venus in the 12th house of Pisces invites you to explore spiritually enriching environments, where beauty and harmony reign. You may find joy in relaxing retreats or artful escapes away from the hustle and bustle. However, be cautious as the presence of Rahu or North Node in the same house could lead to tempting distractions. Stay focused on your true intentions for travel; otherwise, you risk falling into vagueness and escapism.

While Mars is retrograding in your 3rd house of Gemini, expect delays or minor frustrations in short trips or mobile adventures. This isn't the ideal time for impulsive journeys; rather, reassess your travel plans. Look for opportunities that require strategic action instead of jumping into immediate ventures. Next month, as Mercury enters the same sign, communication around travel may improve, allowing clarity and foresight, but until then, avoid hasty decisions.

The latter part of the quarter sees the Sun and Saturn also entering your 12th house, amplifying introspection while restricting carefree exploration. You might find that your travel needs to align with deeper personal growth rather than sheer excitement. Use this opportunity to engage in healing retreats or spiritual pilgrimages rather than light-hearted vacations, as these align better with cosmic energies.

In summary, focus on intentional and introspective travel experiences, keeping in mind the potential for misunderstandings or unexpected issues. Aim for places that offer both beauty and solace, steering clear of frivolous adventures that could aggravate restlessness or arguments. Embrace the journey of self-discovery over mere destination hopping."
            },
            "family": {
              "score": 90,
              "prediction": "As the New Year unfolds, Aries individuals will find their family dynamics blossoming under the warm influence of Jupiter in Taurus, residing in your second house. This favorable positioning heralds an atmosphere filled with nurturing bonds and strengthened relationships. Enhance your family gatherings with quality time, as these moments will not only nourish relationships but also create a lasting impact on your communal values.

Embrace this quarter as an opportunity to engage deeply with loved ones, fostering connections that sparkle with joy and mutual appreciation."
            },

              "score": 67,
              "prediction": "This quarter promises a dynamic landscape for your finances, dear Aries. Luck and expansion are on your side, suggesting opportunities for financial growth, perhaps through new ventures or investments. It's a favorable time for saving and building stability.

As you navigate through the quarter, embracing the positive influences while being cautious of the pitfalls will help you secure a prosperous financial future. Stay mindful and strategic in your choices!"
            },
            "status": {
              "score": 60,
              "prediction": "As we step into the first quarter, Aries, the astrological energies surrounding your status domain are highly favorable. With both Mercury and the Sun illuminating your 10th house in Capricorn, there’s a significant focus on your career and public image.

As the year closes, focus on nurturing your connections, channeling patience, and allowing the spirit of creativity to redefine your approach to love. This balance will lead you to more meaningful experiences in your relationships as you transition into a new year."
            },
            "career": {
              "score": 66,
              "prediction": "As we navigate through the final quarter of the year, Aries natives will find that their career ambitions align harmoniously with the influences of Venus in Virgo, occupying the 6th house. This astrological positioning enhances your dedication to your professional life, allowing you to analyze your responsibilities and adopt a disciplined approach. Expect to receive recognition for your hard work, and don’t be surprised if your reputation begins to soar among peers and superiors.

In this time, enhanced health and harmony in your environment will further fuel your productivity. Structure and organization in your workspace will lead to increased efficiency and clarity. It’s an excellent period for teamwork, where your analytical skills shine and contribute positively to collective goals.

While Venus is not retrograding, maintaining focus on building relationships with colleagues can create an atmosphere of camaraderie. Don't hesitate to express your thoughts on projects; your insights may lead to opportunities or promotions.

As December approaches, be mindful of balancing ambition with well-being. A little self-care will help maintain your energy levels and keep your momentum going. This quarter is rich with potential; seize it with confidence and clarity!"
            },
            "travel": {
              "score": 32,
              "prediction": "In the upcoming months, Aries individuals will find themselves drawn towards travel, particularly towards the end of the year. With key planets shifting into the 9th house of Sagittarius, expect an energetic uplift that encourages exploration and adventure. Shared experiences with loved ones may also be a highlight as Venus transits this house, promising harmonious journeys that enhance relationships.

However, be cautious as Jupiter, positioned in Gemini, is retrograding. This retrograde may cause delays or miscommunication while on the road, potentially leading to frustrating experiences. It's essential to remain flexible in plans and avoid dogmatic thinking. Embrace the spirit of exploration, but steer clear of arguments and misunderstandings that could arise in unfamiliar settings.

As travel plans unfold, discipline will come into play with Saturn in the 12th house, reminding you to balance spontaneity with responsibility. It's a great time for solo travel that might have a spiritual or reflective aspect—allowing for personal growth. Just keep in mind that escapism should be avoided; distractions may tempt you into aimless wandering.

The end of the year brings a push for travel activities, but also remain aware of your surroundings, ensuring that all logistics are clear. A last-minute trip may feel invigorating, yet ensure that any decisions are made with clarity to avoid vagueness. Embrace the journey, but do it wisely!"
            },
            "family": {
              "score": 40,
              "prediction": "This quarter brings a focus on family dynamics and the emotional undercurrents that connect you to your loved ones. With Jupiter in your fourth house, the comfort of your home and familial relationships will be a source of expansion and joy. Expect a surge of luck and wisdom that helps you nurture these bonds. You may find yourself more empathetic, allowing you to foster a deeper understanding within your family.

However, be aware of the potential for moodiness and domestic issues that can arise. This is a time to cultivate patience as you navigate any underlying tensions. Possessiveness and stubbornness may surface; remain open-minded and flexible to avoid these pitfalls. The positive energy from Jupiter can help ground your experiences, providing stability amidst any challenges.

Mid-October could bring a culmination of feelings, where you might need to address lingering insecurities or concerns within the family structure. Embrace the opportunity to align values and strengthen relationships through communication. The key will be to actively engage with your family, sharing ideas and reinforcing your roots. By doing so, you’ll create an enveloping atmosphere of love and support, turning potential issues into opportunities for growth."
            },
            "friends": {
              "score": 35,
              "prediction": "As the final quarter of the year unfolds, Aries natives may experience an influx of social energy, heavily influenced by Rahu or North Node's placement in the 11th house in Aquarius. This position stirs desires for new connections but is also a harbinger of superficiality and group conflicts. You might be drawn into friendships that appear enticing on the surface but may not have the depth or loyalty you seek. It’s essential to differentiate between genuine companionship and fleeting associations.

In December, as Jupiter retrogrades in the 3rd house in Gemini, there will be opportunities for reflection and reevaluation of your friendships. While this may lead to nervousness concerning your social status, it also opens doors for wisdom and insight. Use  time to mend any past misunderstandings or to charm old friends back into your life. However, be cautious of relying solely on social media or casual meet-ups; substance is key during this retrograde.

Expect unpredictable dynamics; some friendships may feel inconsistent or lead to emotional disruptions. It's crucial to communicate clearly and be mindful of how your words might be interpreted. Counterpoint your social desires with discernment, and consider which friendships genuinely uplift you.

In summary, the fourth quarter challenges you to find balance. Embrace the joy of companionship while remaining vigilant against betrayals or disappointments. Use Jupiter's retrograde wisely for introspection, and remember: not every connection is meant to last. Nurture those that thrive on authenticity and mutual respect."
            },
            "finances": {
              "score": 43,
              "prediction": "As the year draws to a close, Aries, your financial landscape is set to be illuminated by a convergence of powerful energies in the eighth house of Scorpio. With Mercury, Mars, and Venus all transiting here, expect an intense conclusion to the financial year, emphasizing communication and action in your financial decisions. 

This stage may bring opportunities to transform your financial strategies. The influence of Mercury will facilitate clear communication, urging you to engage in dialogues about investments or joint ventures. Utilize  time to network and discuss ideas, particularly with trusted associates. However, be wary—Mars may provoke impulsiveness. Invest with caution and avoid making hasty decisions motivated by greed, as such tendencies could lead to unnecessary risks.

The presence of Rahu or North Node in your eleventh house of Aquarius suggests that your financial goals may be influenced by desires that can border on obsession. While the ambition to pioneer new ventures is strong, it's crucial to differentiate between what is genuinely beneficial and what may just serve to satisfy a fleeting urge. The potential for innovation is high; therefore, think creatively about your income streams. Still, remember that unpredictability could accompany such endeavors—stability should be your guiding principle.

Come November, when Venus and the Sun also enter Scorpio, you may find a newfound harmony in your financial dealings. This period will enhance your ability to transform financial relationships into mutually beneficial partnerships, fostering a sense of loyalty. Practice patience, as this will pave the way for solid investments that yield long-term growth rather than immediate results.

As you navigate through this quarter, focus on balancing the intensity of emotions driven by Scorpio's influence against the stability that you, as an Aries, naturally seek. Embrace this transformative energy, remembering that how you approach negotiations and collaborations now will influence your financial health in the upcoming year. Stay vigilant against complacency or conflicts with partners, which could mar the potential rewards of this period."
            },
            "status": {
              "score": 50,
              "prediction": "As the year winds down, Aries natives can expect a dynamic shift in status during this final quarter. The cosmos aligns in your favor, enhancing your public image and leadership qualities.  period is ripe for initiatives that showcase your unique identity, giving you a chance to shine on a larger stage.

With Mars influencing your sign, you may feel a surge of ambition and courage, propelling you to take on new challenges. This is an excellent time to step forward in your career and assert yourself in professional settings. Your appearance will reflect this newfound energy, attracting attention and respect from peers and superiors alike.

However, keep an eye on Venus, which may be retrograding later in the quarter, prompting you to reassess personal relationships and professional partnerships. While your ambition is heightened, ensure that your interactions remain harmonious, avoiding any misunderstandings that could affect your status.

This quarter serves as a testing ground for your discipline and initiative. Those who recognize your leadership will support your aspirations, paving the way for future advancement. Maintain your focus, embrace any challenges with courage, and you'll end the year with significant strides made in your status within both personal and professional realms."
            },
            "prediction": "In the fourth quarter, Aries can expect a period of significant professional development and personal growth. With Mercury influencing communication and intellect in the 10th house of career and ambition, this is an excellent time for networking and advancing in your professional life.

The Sun also shines brightly in Capricorn, boosting your vitality and reinforcing your drive in the workplace. As the Sun transitions into Aries toward the end of the quarter, you'll feel a renewed sense of self and confidence that can lead to personal breakthroughs.

As for Jupiter and Saturn, their combined influence may bring challenges, but also opportunities for discipline and expansion—encouraging you to work hard and stay focused on your long-term goals. query.description: Time of Birth in Hours - HH:MM
TimeZone in jumps of 0.5 - (ex: 5:30 will be 5.5, 5:45 will be 5.75)
placidus, koch, campanus, whole-sign, equal-house, regiomontanus, topocentric

This API supports the following languages: 
be (Bengali), fr (French), hi (Hindi), 
ka (Kannada), ml (Malayalam), sp (Spanish), 
ta (Tamil), te (Telugu), mr (Marathi), si (Sinhalese), 
ne (Nepali), ko (Korean), ja (Japanese), gu (Gujarati), 
pt (Portuguese), de (German), tr (Turkish), 
ru (Russian), it (Italian), nl (Dutch), and pl (Polish).
Start Date considered for transit - DD/MM/YYYY

response.body:
{
        "status": 200,
        "response": {
          "health": "In the midst of each fleeting moment, a surge of invigorating energy cascades through body and mind, gently nudging a spirit of exploration that values fresh perspectives while encouraging an uplifting focus on physical wellness, so that every routine or newfound endeavor becomes a source of enthusiastic renewal and radiant vitality.",
          "relationship": "As curious opportunities arise without warning, the wide-eyed spirit of new beginnings encourages open-hearted encounters that sparkle with the promise of uncharted emotional territories, allowing spontaneous connections to flourish while weaving conversations and shared experiences into a vibrant tapestry of evolving bonds.",
          "career": "Bursting with creative impulses and the promise of bold discovery, professional paths beckon a willingness to step beyond the familiar confines of routine, spurring imaginative thinking and an unencumbered approach to collaboration and planning, so that each task is infused with the exhilarating allure of unexplored potential.",
          "finance": "Within the realm of practical resources and fiscal responsibilities, simple yet meaningful choices align with adventurous instincts to foster both prudent investments and subtle leaps of faith, ensuring an equilibrium between embracing innovative prospects and preserving a stable foundation for ongoing financial security.",
          "id": "the_fool",
